violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Batteries were dead in automatic hand soap dispenser. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Various pizza toppings were observed held at temperatures ranging from 49-52 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. The prep unit was observed held at an ambient temperature 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Food items were loaded into unit from commissary kitchen less than 4 hours prior to inspection and were sent back to commissary kitchen. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2025

The prep unit was unable to maintain an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below and was not in good repair. Middle flip top of prep unit was observed to be bent allowing cold air to escape from unit. Establishment shall not store TCS food items within unit until an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or less is maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
